rho_source: NIST/PNNL Compendium of Material Composition Data, 'Paraffin wax' (ρ=0.93 g/cm³; grade-dependent 0.87–0.93).
method: NCRP-20 elemental Σ_R/ρ × mixture rule (Σ_R = ρ·Σ w_i·(Σ_R/ρ)_i)
citation: NCRP Report No. 20 (1957), Protection against Neutron Radiation up to 30 MeV, NBS Handbook 63; elemental Σ_R/ρ via Akyıldırım (2019), Erzincan Univ. J. Sci. Tech. 12(2) 1141–1148, DOI 10.18185/erzifbed.587514.
